grammarChart:
PASSIVE VOICE | be + past participle
AFFIRMATIVE | S + be + V3
NEGATIVE | S + be not + V3
QUESTION | Be + S + V3?
explanation: Passive voice shifts focus from the doer to the action or result. It is useful in academic writing when the result matters more than the actor. Use it when the agent is unknown, unimportant, or obvious from context.
keyRules: Use the correct tense of be plus past participle.
Move the original object into subject position.
Use by + agent only when the agent matters.
Do not overuse passive voice in simple conversation.
azarNotes: Ask whether the action or the actor is more important.
Common learner error: be + base verb instead of be + past participle.

examples.sentence: The report was submitted before noon.
examples.indonesian: Laporan itu dikumpulkan sebelum tengah hari.

examples.sentence: New policies are often discussed in class.
examples.indonesian: Kebijakan baru sering dibahas di kelas.

commonMistakes.why: Passive voice needs a past participle.
Happen is normally not used in the passive.

ieltsTip: Passive voice is especially useful in formal explanation and process description. Use it when it improves focus, not just because it looks academic.

quiz.question: Choose the best sentence.
options: A) The proposal was approved yesterday.
B) The proposal was approve yesterday.
C) The proposal approved was yesterday.
D) The proposal is approve yesterday.
quiz.explanation: Correct passive form: was + past participle.

quiz.question: Pick the correct option.
options: A) English is spoke in many countries.
B) English is spoken in many countries.
C) English spoken is in many countries.
D) English is speaking in many countries.
quiz.explanation: Passive requires the past participle spoken.

quiz.question: Which sentence should stay active?
options: A) The book was translated into Indonesian.
B) The meeting was postponed.
C) The event was happened online.
D) The road was repaired last year.
quiz.explanation: Happen is not normally used in passive form.

quiz.question: Complete the sentence: The files ___ uploaded before noon.
options: A) was
B) were
C) be
D) been
quiz.explanation: Files is plural, so use were uploaded.

quiz.question: Choose the best correction.
options: A) The policy was announced this morning.
B) The policy was announce this morning.
C) The policy announced was this morning.
D) The policy is announce this morning.
quiz.explanation: Correct passive structure with past participle.
